channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: This tree is between nos 20 and 22 Glenhurst Avenue, 8th June
item.description:
The tree appears to be dead for no apparent reason. It is a mature tree so concerning
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New occupents have dumped fridge in bushes next to house, 8th June
item.description:
New neighbours have dumped a fridge in the bushes next to the house. This is 74 pelham road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pelham Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress this afternoon., 8th June
item.description:
Left at houses car park, in the rain; seems like it’s tenants from the flats next to the car park.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Springfield, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old furniture on Dalmain Road near number 73/75., 8th June
item.description:
Old furniture on Dalmain Road near number 73/75.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dalmain Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disabled bay outside No. 38, 8th June
item.description:
Large electric bike chained to lamp post adjacent to disabled parking bay making it very difficult for disabled person to get in or out of car.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Fairhazel Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress on communcal balcony, 8th June
item.description:
Mattress on upstairs communal balcony, purportedly left for 3 months without being removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Murray Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned and unroadworthy vehicle, 8th June
item.description:
A Bentley car bearing the registration number B1RGF has been parked on Parkdale Road j/w Chestnut Rise (adjacent to a post box) for several weeks. Flat tyres indicate that it is unroadworthy and lack of movement indicates that it is unwanted. No trace of the vehicle can be found at gov.uk, suggesting that either the registration number if carries is false, or that the last registered keeper has falsely declared that the vehicle has been scrapped (SORN not being appropriate because it on the public highway). Please arrange for this vehicle to be removed.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chestnut Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot holes opposite 131-135, 8th June
item.description:
Multiple potholes . very uneven surfice needs to get sorted . trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, White Horse Hill, Coldharbour, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive dangerous pothole, 8th June
item.description:
There is a massive dangerous pothole which is a serious hazard to passing cyclists and permitted traffic The whole Haringey part of Hillside road has quiet a few of potholes which needs URGENTLY seeing to

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillside Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post on Hillside off valley road erith not working, 8th June
item.description:
Lamp post on Hillside, off valley road Erith not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bramble Croft, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing public bin, 8th June
item.description:
Full bin and litter surrounding it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Cardboard and litter everywhere., 8th June
item.description:
The cardboard has been there for weeks and the street looks aess

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Villiers Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Flytip, 8th June
item.description:
Flytipped foam/mattress

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Repeated dog fouling, 8th June
item.description:
Repeated dog fouling on corner on Main Road and Orchard Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orchard Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burnt out car seen from our school playground, 8th June
item.description:
Please can this car be removed from Yarnton Way - it is located right by our school and it gives an upsetting impression to the children the car has been there for at least a week and may even have been there for three weeks as we have been on school holidays

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yarnton Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regarding report ref 9571357, 8th June
item.description:
I have just received an email with a reply from the council about reference number 9571357. The answer simply states “ State changed to: not the council's responsibility”. So whose responsibility is it?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastgate Close, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti vandalism, 8th June
item.description:
Graffiti on electrical box on pathway to flats at Marchwood Close, near path behind Southampton Way Estate bus stop (stop D).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marchwood Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bed bases and mattresses, 8th June
item.description:
Usual spot over many years
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Timbercroft Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped garden waste in front of garage gates blocking entrance, 8th June
item.description:
Dumped / fly tipped garden waste in front of garage gates blocking entrance for vehicles

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elmbridge Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A number of Nox bottles dumped outside our rear gate, 8th June
item.description:
The hard standing outside our rear gate is a regular dumping ground for crisp packets and the like. this time we have a lot of NO2 bottles . i don’t know if it relates to the regular illegal access made by people on quad and trail bikes into the neighbour’s land opposite.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheepcote Lane, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
